name: Cheese Souffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine milk and salt in a saucepan over medium heat. Scald the mixture.
2. Sprinkle Cream of Rice into the scalded milk while stirring constantly.
3. Cook for 1 minute, then remove from heat. Cover and let stand for 4 minutes.
4. Add butter to the rice mixture and stir until melted.
5. Gradually blend in the cheese using a whisk.
6. Beat egg whites with an electric mixer until stiff but not dry.
7. Beat egg yolks with a pinch of salt until lemon-colored.
8. Fold about one-third of the beaten egg whites into the egg yolk mixture.
9. Gently fold in the remaining egg whites to combine.
10. Pour the batter into an unbuttered souffle dish or an 1-1/2 quart baking dish.
11. If desired, lightly butter the dish and dust with Parmesan cheese.
12. Sprinkle the top with additional Parmesan cheese.
13. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F (165°C) until puffed and golden brown, about 40 minutes.
14. Serve immediately.
